allow:
Bash(/c/Python314/python.exe -c "
import zipfile

zip_path = r'C:\\Users\\ahmad\\flutter_sdk.zip'

print\('Testing zip file integrity...'\)
try:
    with zipfile.ZipFile\(zip_path, 'r'\) as zf:
        bad = zf.testzip\(\)
        if bad:
            print\(f'First bad file: {bad}'\)
        else:
            names = zf.namelist\(\)
            print\(f'Zip OK — {len\(names\)} files'\)
            print\(f'First entry: {names[0]}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
